subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of divine bounty, render thanks unto the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting Lord, that thou art walking upon the straight path and following the way [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست باده موهبت رحمانی شکر کن حی قیومرا که بصراط مستقیم سالکی و بر منهج
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
